name: 456 Minimal Bubble Shooter
description: Put your strategy skills to the test! Compete against friends and family and see who can reach the highest score and get 3 stars on every level. Earn coins while you play and use them to get cool boosters. Use your logic and puzzle-solving skills to complete the missions and clear the board, and make sure to collect special daily bonuses.
instructions: Try the Puzzle Game Mode and Discover the Ultimate Bubble Popping Fun This shooter is a thrilling balloon popper free app with thousands of challenging puzzles to master Shoot the colorful balls to advance to the next amazing puzzle level train
tags: Bubble, Bubble Shooter, Game, Games, Puzzle, Shoot, Shooter, Shooting
